test.name: verify login

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element '(//a[@class='button product_type_simple add_to_cart_button ajax_add_to_cart'][normalize-space()='Add to basket'])[1]'.
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.msg: MoveTargetOutOfBoundsException: Message: Move target (1256, 764) is out of bounds of viewport dimensions (1536, 731) Stacktrace: RemoteError@chrome://remote/content/shared/RemoteError.sys.mjs:8:8 WebDriverError@chrome://remote/content/shared/webdriver/Errors.sys.mjs:202:5 MoveTargetOutOfBoundsError@chrome://remote/content/shared/webdriver/Errors.sys.mjs:521:5 assertTargetInViewPort@chrome://remote/content/shared/webdriver/Actions.sys.mjs:3170:11 #assertInViewPort@chrome://remote/content/marionette/actors/MarionetteCommandsChild.sys.mjs:67:17 receiveMessage@chrome://remote/content/marionette/actors/MarionetteCommandsChild.sys.mjs:187:42
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
